response.step_by_step_log: I identified the song as 'Kanade' (奏) based on the on-screen text. I searched for 'Kanade Sukima Switch Japanese and English lyrics' and successfully found both the original Japanese lyrics and an English translation. The performer is identified as Otonose Kanade, as indicated by the hashtag #音乃瀬奏生誕祭2025.
response.global_summary: A vocal performance of the song "Kanade" (originally by Sukima Switch) by the virtual performer Otonose Kanade. The video features her singing and playing guitar in a stage setting.

scenes.description: The virtual performer Otonose Kanade starts singing 'Kanade' while playing the guitar on stage. The video includes on-screen text '奏 (かなで)' in the top left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
改札の前 つなぐ手と手
いつものざわめき 新しい風
明るく見送るはずだったのに
うまく笑えずに君を見ていた

君が大人になってくその季節が
悲しい歌で溢れないように
最後に何か君に伝えたくて
「さよなら」に代わる言葉を探してた

君がどこに行ったって僕の声で守るよ
云いたいこと言えなくたって
いつだって奏でてるから
君がどこに行ったって僕の声で守るよ
云いたいこと言えなくたって
いつだって奏でてるから
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
In front of the ticket gate, holding hands.
The usual buzzing, a new wind.
I was supposed to see you off cheerfully,
But I was looking at you, unable to smile well.

The season that you grow up in,
So that it won't be filled with sad songs.
I wanted to tell you one last thing,
And I stopped you with a 'Goodbye'.

Even if you go somewhere far away,
It's okay, because in my voice,
Everything remains the same.
As long as I keep playing,
I'll be connected to you.

Even if you go somewhere far away,
It's okay, because in my voice,
Everything remains the same.
As long as I keep playing,
I'll be connected to you.
